channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in PHP (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in PHP nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐘 gcoyerk/quickbooks-windows-master (282 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: gcoyerk

📝 Repository: gcoyerk/quickbooks-windows-master

📄 Descrizione: Toolkit for integrating applications with QuickBooks Desktop on Windows using QuickBooks Web Connector. Supports automated data exchange, customer synchronization, invoices, payments, and accounting workflows.

⭐ Stelle: 282

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

🏷️ Topics: accounting automation bookkeeping crm customer-sync erp integration invoice-sync payment-sync php qbook qbxml quickbooks quickbooks-desktop quickbooks-integration quickbooks-web-connector windows

📜 Licenza: Eclipse Public License 1.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-15T17:48:41Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-23T17:59:49Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐘 anousss007/laravel-vigilance (186 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: anousss007

📝 Repository: anousss007/laravel-vigilance

📄 Descrizione: A driver-agnostic control center for Laravel queues, jobs, commands & scheduler — plus whole-app APM, tracing, job batches, metrics, alerts and uptime. Self-hosted, production-safe.

⭐ Stelle: 186

🍴 Forks: 8

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-14T13:44:32Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-08T18:54:28Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐘 MADEVAL/FerryAI (56 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: MADEVAL

📝 Repository: MADEVAL/FerryAI

📄 Descrizione: Native AI inference for PHP 8.3+ - run ONNX, GGUF (llama.cpp) and RubixML models directly in your PHP process via FFI. Chat, streaming, embeddings, RAG and vector search. No Python, no HTTP microservices, no Docker sidecars.

⭐ Stelle: 56

🍴 Forks: 31

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

🏷️ Topics: ai embeddings ffi generative-ai gguf inference llama-cpp llm llm-inference local-llm machine-learning nlp onnx onnxruntime php php8 rag semantic-search transformers vector-database

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-04T10:45:08Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-11T03:38:19Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: RomaLytar

📝 Repository: RomaLytar/yammi-audit-log

📄 Descrizione: Laravel audit log & change history with real actor attribution (user / job / command / scheduler), cross-model change traces, time machine, tamper-evident hash chain, GDPR reports, anomaly detection, Slack/webhook alerts, multi-tenancy and an optional dashboard.

⭐ Stelle: 42

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

🏷️ Topics: activity-log audit audit-log audit-trail change-tracking compliance dashboard eloquent forensics gdpr history laravel laravel-package multi-tenancy observability php provenance queue-tracing security tamper-evident

📝 Repository: petersonbasso/zabbix-module-discovery-neighbors

📄 Descrizione: A native Zabbix module to display real-time network neighbors (LLDP/CDP/EDP) on host popup menus with an interactive SVG topology map.
